one_time_description: Prior period restatement due to change in accounting policy - York Factory First Nation Limited Partnership now fully consolidated, reducing accumulated surplus by $250,000
economic_notes: York Factory First Nation holds an investment in Keeyask Hydropower Limited Partnership at cost of $58,820,895. Manitoba Hydro loan secured by YFFN LP units in Keeyask Hydropower LP. Joint venture with Sodexo Canada Inc. and Fox Lake Cree Nation. Kawechiwasik Development Corporation and Silver Goose Lodge Ltd. are wholly owned business entities accounted for under modified equity method.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 not 2024. Prior period restatement in 2020 comparatives due to full consolidation of York Factory First Nation Limited Partnership. Investments in Keeyask Hydropower LP total $68,369,074 - a major long-term partnership asset. Long-term debt of $70.7M is dominated by Manitoba Hydro loan ($68.5M) including $9.5M accrued interest, secured by KHLP units. Investments line on balance sheet is negative ($-208,608) due to losses in Kawechiwasik Development Corporation recorded under modified equity method. Construction in progress of $10.1M not included in tangible capital assets figure. No schedule of remuneration provided. Child care segment shown separately from social services.
